name: Get workspaces with camelCase order
description: TC-005-WS-ORDER: GET /api/workspaces?orgId=...&order=updatedAt+desc must not 500 (regression: cloud.layer5.io outage)

steps.name: order=updatedAt desc does not 500
REQUIRE: Request should complete without error
REQUIRE: Response should not be nil

steps.name: REQUIRE: order=updatedAt desc caused a 500 — regression of the workspaces ORDER BY qualifier bug

order=updatedAt asc does not 500
REQUIRE: Request should complete without error
REQUIRE: Response should not be nil
